topic: eBay Item Specifics for CPSC compliance
findings: CPSC defines children's products as those intended for children 12 years of age or younger.
Using specific Age Level values like 'Adult Collector' or '17 Years & Up' helps signal the product is not for children.
eBay provides a 'Product Safety' section in the listing flow for safety warnings and pictograms.
The 'Age Level' field is the primary technical indicator on eBay to distinguish adult collectibles from toys.

recommended_fields.note: Avoid any range including ages 12 and under to bypass CPSIA requirements.
Found in the listing editor under Item disclosures > Product Safety.

recommended_values: Not intended for children under 14 years of age
recommended_fields.note: CPSC considers marketing copy when determining intended audience.
